perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a beret stands in a kitchen, holding a large blue bag of frozen shrimp from Costco; she gestures toward it and speaks excitedly. (2) In a close-up, liquid from a Bacardi bottle is poured over shrimp in a glass bowl; a hand uses a salt/pepper grinder over the shrimp. (3) A hand pours oil into a frying pan on a stove, followed by minced garlic, which sizzles in the oil. (4) The shrimp are added to the pan with tweezers, and a slice of butter is placed on top as they turn pink. (5) More pepper and salt are ground onto the cooking shrimp, and the pan is shaken to mix the ingredients.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic background music starts immediately; a female voice speaks with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone. (2) The sound of liquid pouring is audible as the female continues her narration. (3) Sharp clicking sounds of a grinder being used, followed by the distinct sizzling of oil and garlic in a hot pan. (4) The female voice maintains a steady pace, explaining the cooking steps over the rhythmic BGM and persistent sizzling. (5) The music continues at a consistent volume as the cooking sounds of clinking tweezers and shaking the pan fade towards the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Costco Wholesale, 簡單做料理 (Simple Cooking) - Tone: Informative. (2) Decorative Text: 科克蘭冷凍帶尾超大養殖生蝦仁 (Kirkland frozen tail-on jumbo farmed raw shrimp), 908克 (908g), 大概是兩磅 (About 2 lbs), 559元 (559 NTD) - Tone: Hook/Promotional. (3) Functional Text: 隨意的萊姆酒 (Random rum), 加胡椒鹽 (Add pepper salt), 倒入蒜 (Pour in garlic), 放入蝦蝦 (Put in shrimp), 加入奶油 (Add butter) - Tone: Instructional.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Ingredient Prep -> Cooking Process -> Final Simmer

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator identified at the start and through hands during cooking.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman wearing a white collared shirt, a dark blue beret, and light-colored nails.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a modern home interior with a brown leather couch in the background, then shifts to a clean, well-lit kitchen with white countertops, a black induction stove, and various kitchen appliances and bottles on shelves.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Ingredient Demo -> Process -> Result
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a quick-paced cooking tutorial aimed at showcasing the value and ease of using Costco's Kirkland brand frozen shrimp. It leverages a high-energy presentation style to encourage viewers to purchase the product and try the simple recipe at home.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product packaging, mentioning the specific store (Costco), and providing price details.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Constant high-energy tone, specific 'Simple Cooking' title card branding.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard 'lifestyle influencer' format common on short-form video platforms, focusing on consumer tips and home-cooking convenience.
